examples.title: Header Files Example
examples.description: An example of using header files in C++.
examples.explanation: This example shows how to include a user-defined header file (myheader.h) and a system header file (iostream) in a C++ program.

examples.title: Main Function Example
examples.description: An example of the main function in C++.
examples.explanation: This example shows the basic structure of the main function in C++, including the argc and argv parameters.

examples.title: Conditional Compilation Example
examples.description: An example of using conditional compilation in C++.
examples.explanation: This example shows how to use conditional compilation to prevent multiple inclusions of a header file.
